source.title: Result Note: BNP 142 — stable, no change
source.body: BNP 142 today, mildly elevated from 118 in February but well below historical decompensated range. Weight stable per recent MyChart messages. No diuretic adjustment. Continue current torsemide dose and recheck BNP at June follow-up. No callback required.

nurseNote:
Dr. Davis reviewed BNP today. Result 142 mildly elevated from prior 118 in 2/2026 but well below historical decompensated range. Weight stable per recent MyChart messages. No medication changes. Continue current torsemide; recheck BNP at June follow-up.

Patient notified via MyChart.

mychart.subject: Test results
mychart.body:
Dr. Davis has reviewed your recent BNP (a protein your heart releases when it is under stress). Your level today is 142, slightly higher than your result in February but still well within your usual range and well below where we would worry. Your weight has stayed stable, which is reassuring.

No changes to your medications. Continue your current torsemide as prescribed. We will recheck your BNP at your next routine follow-up in June.

Please let us know if you experience shortness of breath, swelling, or weight gain greater than 2-3 lbs in a single day.

Brandon Sterne, RN BSN / Cardiology Associates

orderPad.note: Pattern 1 SYNTHESIS only — no orders fire.
